prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of Deere & Company (DE), the stock typically exhibits moderate volatility with daily standard deviation around 2-3%. Using a 6-day forward projection with assumed daily volatility of 2.1%, the point estimate reflects slight upward momentum common in industrial stocks. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with compounded daily volatility over 6 trading days, resulting in approximately ±1.1% for 50% CI, ±2.0% for 80% CI, and ±2.5% for 90% CI around the point estimate.
